name: tauri-postgres-agent-harness
description: Deterministic agent harness for Tauri 2 + React 19 + Hono + Drizzle/Postgres 16 pnpm monorepos shipped as signed Windows .exe: Claude Code hooks, security-invariant lint gates, RLS isolation tests against real Postgres, Tauri capability/CSP policy gates, provenance pipeline, and supply-chain-hardened CI across npm and crates — installable into any new or existing project.
